name: Mexican Hash
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef and onion until the onion is tender.
2. Stir in the tomato sauce, chili powder, Worcestershire sauce, and brown sugar. Simmer until thickened.
3. Meanwhile, prepare the hash browns by placing them in a pie pan or 9x9x2 inch pan.
4. Top the hash browns with the meat mixture.
5. Slice the tomatoes over the top of the hash browns.
6. Sprinkle shredded cheese evenly over the tomatoes.
7. Broil until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
